device_name: Ethos Treatment Management, Ethos Treatment Planning, Ethos Radiotherapy System, Halcyon
intended_use: Ethos Treatment Management is used to manage and monitor radiation therapy treatment plans and sessions; it is intended to be used with a treatment planning system. Ethos Treatment Planning is used to
intended_use_full: Ethos Treatment Management is used to manage and monitor radiation therapy treatment plans and sessions; it is intended to be used with a treatment planning system. Ethos Treatment Planning is used to generate and modify radiation therapy treatment plans. Halcyon and Ethos Radiotherapy System are intended to provide stereotactic radiosurgery and precision radiotherapy for lesions, tumors, and conditions anywhere in the body where radiation treatment is indicated.
target_condition: lesions, tumors, and conditions anywhere in the body where radiation treatment is indicated
